hero.title: Email Assistant
hero.description: Organize email projects, write drafts, reuse templates, and keep a clear history of follow-up work.
points: History for sent and reviewed emails

flow.title: Projects -> Drafts -> Templates -> History
steps: Review the history of email work

differences.title: Move from intent to polished email
differences.description: Email Assistant keeps the planning, writing, reuse, and review steps in one focused workflow.

items.title: Project context
items.description: Keep the audience, goal, tone, and status for each email effort in one record.

items.title: Draft clarity
items.description: Write email drafts with visible project context and reusable template support.

items.title: Follow-up history
items.description: Track important draft, review, sent, and archived activity after the message is prepared.

feel.title: A calmer way to manage important emails
feel.description: The workflow helps users separate planning from writing and preserve the useful trail of email work.

items.title: Plan the message
items.description: Start with the audience, goal, and tone before writing.

items.title: Shape the draft
items.description: Keep the subject and body connected to the right project.

items.title: Reuse strong patterns
items.description: Save common email structures as templates for future messages.

audiences.title: Who uses Email Assistant
audiences.description: Useful for people who write important professional emails and need a repeatable process.

items.title: Job seekers
items.description: Draft outreach, follow-up, and application emails with consistent context.

items.title: Managers
items.description: Prepare clear updates, announcements, and sensitive messages.

items.title: Client-facing teams
items.description: Maintain reusable templates and review history for important communication.

resourceSection.title: Email work that stays organized
resourceSection.description: Keep each message easy to prepare, reuse, and revisit later.

items.title: Project records
items.description: Capture the purpose and audience for each email workflow.

items.title: Reusable templates
items.description: Maintain strong patterns for repeat communication.

items.title: History entries
items.description: Preserve key draft, sent, review, and archive events.

groupedSection.title: Organize email outcomes
groupedSection.description: Separate email work by what the user needs to do next.

items.name: Projects
items.description: Define the audience, goal, tone, and status.

items.name: Drafts
items.description: Write the subject and message body with project context.

items.name: Templates
items.description: Save reusable subject and body patterns.

items.name: History
items.description: Track what changed, reviewed, sent, or archived.

technicalSection.title: Built as App #025
technicalSection.description: Email Assistant follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: User-scoped email project, draft, template, and history records.
Protected typed API workflow with generated frontend OpenAPI services.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize your next email?
finalCta.description: Open Email Assistant and move from message intent to reusable email workflow.
